summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KEEPER NRI Property Protection Platform. All core functionality working perfectly including backend APIs, frontend pages, navigation, contact form, and mobile responsiveness.

design_issues.issue: Recharts showing width/height warnings in console
design_issues.details: Chart renders correctly but shows console warnings about container dimensions

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections (hero, problem, solution, how-it-works, features, trust, why-keeper, coverage, pricing, testimonial, final-cta)
Header navigation works - all links navigate correctly
Contact page multi-step form works (3 steps with validation)
FAQ page loads with search functionality
Pricing page shows 3 plans (Basic, Premium, Elite)
Demo Dashboard loads with tabs (overview, alerts, approvals)
How It Works page loads correctly
Footer renders with all columns (brand, services, company, support)
CTA buttons link correctly to contact page
